title: Support - Device page Go button
scenario: Support > Device page flow displays paired devices and opens Poly Contact Support page via "Go" button
steps: 1. Pair and connect a Poly Bluetooth headset to the mobile device.
2. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Tap the Menu icon (hamburger menu) on the Home screen.
7. Verify the screen displays the text "Which device do you have issues with?" and lists all paired devices.
8. Tap on a listed paired device.
10. Verify the modal displays the following device details: Name, Product ID, Serial Number, Software Version, Headset Revision, and Last Connected.
11. Verify the modal displays a "Go" button.
expected: The screen displays "Which device do you have issues with?" and lists all paired devices. Tapping a device shows a modal with device details (Name, Product ID, Serial Number, Software Version, Headset Revision, Last Connected) and a "Go" button. Tapping "Go" opens the Poly Contact Support page at https://support.hp.com/contact/product/poly-lens-mobile-app/2101801768/model/2101801771?source=polydropdown.
